headline: Heat spikes to 98°F Sunday — run zones again by Friday.
weather_notes: Run both zones again by Friday morning — 95°F Saturday and 98°F Sunday exceed what today's irrigation alone will cover.
Do all bed work before 9 AM Friday through Sunday — 91-98°F heat with zero rain forecast closes all afternoon outdoor windows for the holiday weekend.
Top up mulch on e1-e4 before Friday — 12-day transplants need 2-3 inches of cover to buffer the 95-98°F weekend heat spike.

surfaced_tasks.title: Finish hilling the potato bags
surfaced_tasks.reason: 7 days overdue — Jun 24 log confirms 3 bags need one final hill; Thursday morning is the last cool window before 91-98°F closes outdoor work through the weekend.

suggested_tasks.title: Check peach tree for signs of life
suggested_tasks.description: 29 days since the Jun 3 'possibly dead' log with no follow-up — assess before Sunday's 98°F to decide on intervention or replacement.
